products.title: Okatsune 412 Whetstone
products.body_html:
Okatsune 412 Whetstone


A beautiful garden begins with well-maintained tools. The Okatsune 412 Whetstone is a remarkable accessory, specifically created to maintain the fine and precise edge of your pruning shears. Cultivated from the Japanese tradition of excellence, this stone ensures simple and efficient maintenance, being essential for any gardener who prizes quality.

Care and Performance for Exceptional Tools

Regular use of the whetstone not only enhances cutting performance but also considerably extends the lifespan of your Okatsune tools. It is a gesture of respect toward your instruments, ensuring that every cut applied to your roses remains clean and healthy.

Simplicity in Use

Designed to be practical and easy to handle, the stone is suitable for both enthusiasts who care for their own collection and professionals seeking a high standard in every detail.

Main Features:

  • Compatibility: Universal, for all Okatsune tools and shears.
  • Dimensions: 150 × 25 × 9 mm (compact and ergonomic).
  • Weight: 60 g (lightweight for precise control).

The Famous Roses Quality Standard

The Okatsune tools found at Famous Roses are original, manufactured in Japan, and brought to Romania through official channels. We do not work with imitations or products of unclear origin. We choose only professional tools, designed to withstand hard work and remain by your side for many years in the garden or nursery.

Warranty Information

The warranty for this product is 2 years and covers manufacturing and material defects. The warranty does not cover normal wear and tear over time, damage caused by improper use, or extreme working conditions.

To resolve an issue, proof of purchase (invoice or order confirmation) and clear photos of the product are required. In certain cases, the product may be requested for inspection at our location.

products.title: Okatsune 103 Pruning Shears and Silky Saw Set
products.body_html:
Exceptional Gardening Set: Okatsune 103 Pruning Shears & Silky Super Accel Saw

This exceptional quality set brings together two of the most revered Japanese tools, presented in an elegant form that is ideal as a prestigious gift or a distinguished addition to your own professional collection. It is a choice of refinement, created for those who understand that a precise cut is the first step toward a healthy and harmonious garden.

The set is meticulously curated to cover the full spectrum of tasks: from the delicate pruning of roses with the Okatsune 103, to the efficient clearing of vigorous branches with the Silky Super Accel.

What this high-quality set includes:

1. Silky Super Accel Folding Saw (21 cm)
A remarkable instrument known for its lightness and proven performance. The 210 mm blade, featuring a specialized large-teeth configuration for green wood (7.5 teeth/30 mm), allows for the effortless cutting of branches exceeding 10 cm. The rubber-clad aluminum handle ensures a secure grip, making it a favorite among professionals and gardeners who prize excellence.

2. Okatsune 103 Pruning Shears
A legendary model recognized for its refined simplicity. The blades are forged with rigorous attention from IZUMO YASUGI Japanese steel, providing a smooth, clean cut that protects the plant's health. Perfectly suited for medium-sized hands, it manages branches up to 25 mm with surgical precision, making it the ideal tool for roses, shrubs, and fruit trees.

3. Silky Gomcase W Double Holster – Included as a Gift
For a fluid and seamless working experience, the set includes a robust, double-compartment holster. This allows you to keep both essential tools at your side, protecting them while offering total freedom of movement throughout your garden.

The Famous Roses Quality Standard:

The Okatsune and Silky tools you find at Famous Roses are authentic, manufactured in Japan, and imported through official channels. We do not work with imitations; we select only professional-grade tools designed to handle hard work and remain by your side for many years in the garden or nursery.

Warranty Information:

The warranty for this product is 2 years and covers manufacturing and material defects. The warranty does not cover normal wear and tear, blade sharpening, or damage caused by improper use or extreme working conditions.

To resolve an issue, proof of purchase (invoice or order confirmation) and clear photos of the product are required. In certain cases, the product may be requested for inspection.

products.title: Silky Super Accel 210 Folding Saw
products.body_html:
Silky Super Accel 210-7.5 – The Folding Saw for a Flawless Garden


The Silky Super Accel 210 is more than just a tool; it is a trusted partner for those moments when your garden deserves attentive and precise care. This exceptional folding saw blends the elegance of Japanese design with remarkable cutting performance, transforming demanding tasks into a light and rewarding experience.

Proven Performance and Japanese Precision

The 210 mm blade is ground with rigorous precision, featuring four cutting angles along its entire length. This advanced technology allows for extremely clean and smooth cuts that promote the rapid healing of branches, preserving the health and vitality of your trees and shrubs. It is a tool engineered for fast, fluid cutting without the need for sustained physical effort.

High-Standard Ergonomics and Safety

The lightweight aluminum handle, wrapped in a high-grip rubber coating, ensures a comfortable and secure hold regardless of working conditions. For your peace of mind, the blade locks firmly into two different positions, preventing any risk of accidental closure. The ergonomic, pistol-grip design provides maximum control on the pull stroke, offering unmatched stability and precise direction.

A Versatile Instrument for the Discerning Enthusiast

Prized by arborists and collectors worldwide, the Silky Super Accel is ideal for both routine garden maintenance and professional outdoor projects. Choosing a tool that cuts cleanly is a gesture of respect toward nature, leaving behind a garden that is both orderly and vigorous.

Main Features:

  • Blade length: 210 mm (ideal for medium and large branches)
  • Teeth configuration: Large (7.5 teeth per 30 mm), optimized for green wood
  • Weight: Only 200 g, for exceptional maneuverability
  • Origin: Japan (guaranteed quality through rigorous selection)

The Famous Roses Quality Standard

The Silky tools available at Famous Roses are authentic, manufactured in Japan, and imported through official channels. We do not tolerate imitations; we select only professional-grade tools designed to withstand hard work and remain by your side for many years in the garden or nursery.

Warranty Information

This product comes with a 2-year warranty covering manufacturing and material defects. The warranty does not cover normal wear and tear, blade sharpening, or damage caused by improper use or extreme working conditions.

To resolve any issue, proof of purchase (invoice or order confirmation) and clear photographs of the product are required. In certain instances, the product may be requested for inspection at our headquarters.

products.title: OKATSUNE 103 Professional Pruning Shears
products.body_html:
OKATSUNE 103 Professional Pruning Shears


The Okatsune 103 is the benchmark Japanese pruning shear for daily work in the garden and nursery. It's made for those who truly put it to work, not just take it out of the drawer twice a year – a simple, brutally efficient tool that gets the job done without fuss.

If you're tired of "branded" shears that look good on the packaging but start catching, getting loose, or simply stop cutting properly after a while, the Okatsune 103 is the correct alternative: a tool designed to last for years under intensive working conditions. It is for professionals and enthusiasts who no longer want hobby-grade tools.

With a length of 200 mm, it fits very well in most users' hands and is easy to control for both fine cuts and thicker branches. You can effortlessly cut branches up to 25 mm in diameter, covering a large part of the usual work in the garden and in production.

The blades are made from IZUMO YASUGI Japanese steel, which is very hard (60–61 HRC), the same type of steel used for samurai swords. You feel this immediately in use: the shears glide easily through wood, cut cleanly, and maintain their sharp blade for a long time, even when working intensively season after season.

The blade shape is designed so that the sap is pushed outside the cutting area. This way, less dirt – dust, fine debris, or dry mud – sticks to the blade, keeping the shears cleaner and making your work easier.

The spring between the handles opens and closes the shears smoothly, so your hand tires less during repetitive cuts. The locking system is simple and can be operated with one hand, so you can close and open the shears quickly and safely. When you feel it's no longer cutting as aggressively, you can easily restore the blade to its original sharpness with an Okatsune whetstone.

In short: the Okatsune 103 is a robust, simple, and highly efficient Japanese pruning shear, suitable for both professional gardeners and enthusiasts who want a reliable tool they can count on for years.

Main Features:

  • Benchmark model in the Okatsune range
  • Suitable for medium hands
  • Total length: 200 mm
  • Maximum cutting diameter: 25 mm
  • Blade length: 55 mm
  • Weight: approx. 220–225 g
  • Blades made from IZUMO YASUGI Japanese steel (60–61 HRC), also used for samurai swords
  • One-handed operable locking mechanism
  • Spring for smooth opening and closing

The Famous Roses Quality Standard:

The Okatsune tools you find at Famous Roses are original, manufactured in Japan, and brought to Romania through official channels. We do not work with copies or products without a clear origin. We choose only professional tools, designed to handle hard work and stay with you for many years in the garden or nursery.

Warranty Information:

The warranty for this product is 2 years and covers manufacturing and material defects. The warranty does not cover normal wear and tear over time, blade sharpening, damage caused by improper use, or extreme working conditions.

To resolve an issue, proof of purchase (invoice or order confirmation) and clear photos of the product are required. In certain cases, the product may be requested for inspection at our location.

products.title: Herzogin Christiana
products.body_html: A very interesting floribunda rose with an intoxicating fragrance, pompom flower balls, excellent disease resistance and bushy, erect growth. A prominent member of the precious Parfuma collection. Winner of the ADR award in 2015, the perfume award in Saverne and the special award in Zweibrücken. This beauty of a rose greets with an unusual fruity top note: the first impression is reminiscent of lemon, it shines like a fine champagne note, presents a breath of elderberry and a discreet peak of ripe raspberry. Freshness dominates the heart note. An airy impression of fresh apples in the garden after a summer rain, accompanied by a rather soft base note with a light and sweet sweetness and a classic bouquet of roses. A magnificent rose that will delight you throughout the season with its exceptional flowers painted in shades of pale pink that open to an immaculate white when mature. The plant received the ADR award for its extraordinary resistance to diseases. At maturity its very healthy vegetation can reach heights of 70-80 cm. Truly a show of fragrance and color that you will fall in love with irremediably from the first bloom.
products.vendor: German floribunda rose bred by Kordes

products.title: Vanessa Bell
products.body_html:
"Vanessa Bell" is an exceptional floribunda rose created by David Austin, bringing a touch of elegance to your garden. The buds open in delicate shades of pink, forming medium-sized cups clustered in large groups.

The flowers are infused with pale yellow tones that lighten almost to white at the edges, creating a subtle and refined contrast. The fragrance recalls green tea with hints of lemon and honey, offering a fresh and pleasant note. The shrub develops into a bushy, upright form, reaching mature heights of 110-120 cm.

Its name pays homage to Vanessa Bell, an artist, designer, and founding member of the Bloomsbury Group, and sister to writer Virginia Woolf. "Vanessa Bell" blooms repeatedly throughout the season, surely adding an extra layer of refinement and beauty to your garden.
products.vendor: English floribunda rose bred by David Austin

products.title: Tranquility
products.body_html:
This rose has petals loaded with serenity. Which means that, soon, your garden will be able to read like in a reading room. Only the breeze can be felt on Tranquility's vegetation. Or maybe a bee or two can be heard buzzing through the large flowers so masterfully created by the great David Austin.

Otherwise, just silence. A tranquility in which to leisurely admire the purity of the large flowers made up of about 100 petals each, flowers painted in a shade of pure white with hints of yellow in the center. A tranquility in which to enjoy the soft perfume, with fruity notes that come to complete the perfection of this rose that will continue to bloom again and again throughout the season.

At maturity, Tranquility will reach heights of 90-100 cm. But until then, you'll have all the time in the world to watch it grow every morning when it shakes off the dew, or every sunset when its delicate flowers are painted reddish by the sun.
We at Famous Roses are fascinated by how much a rose as gentle and beautiful as Tranquility can convey. And if you decide to order it, we are here to help you with advice, not just with a guarantee for the grip.

Recommended for cut flowers in vases and floral arrangements. The cut flower has a resistance of about 5 days.

Quality 1+ (premium). The bushes are from the 2nd year, they are healthy, obtained by grafting on the strongest rootstock in the world at the moment. It gives the roses vigor and great resistance over time.
products.vendor: English floribunda rose bred by David Austin

products.title: Thomas A Becket
products.body_html:
This variety stands out significantly from the typical English rose, with a more natural character and a bushier growth habit. The flowers are a striking purplish-red, developing individually with a shallow form, opening into informal rosettes. The petals quickly lose their color intensity as the flowers age. The fragrance is that of an old rose, enriched with strong hints of lemon zest.

The shrub forms a robust and rather informal bush, reaching mature heights of 120-140 cm. It blooms repeatedly and abundantly throughout the season, providing a constant source of beauty and fragrance.
products.vendor: English floribunda rose bred by David Austin

products.title: The Poet's Wife
products.body_html:
A Floribunda rose from David Austin, 'The Poet's Wife' will undoubtedly win your heart from its very first bloom. This rose bears rich yellow flowers that develop in an exceptionally pleasing and neat manner, emanating an intense, wonderfully complex fragrance with fruity notes that grow sweeter and deeper as the bloom matures. 

The shrub forms a bushy and beautifully rounded mound with arching branches and glossy foliage, reaching heights of 100-110 cm at maturity. Shrub-type roses are renowned for their vigorous shrubby growth habit, developing as self-supporting bushes that require no support or structures, unlike climbing roses. They are ideal for adding volume to the garden, occupying a much more generous space than modern hybrids and offering a rich visual spectacle through their natural, dense form. 

Extremely elegant and refined, 'The Poet's Wife' will surely be the centerpiece of your garden.
products.vendor: English floribunda rose bred by David Austin

products.title: The Pilgrim
products.body_html:
Named after the pilgrims in Chaucer's Canterbury Tales, THE PILGRIM climbing rose/shrub is a consummate David Austin creation. A genuine English climbing rose with flowers painted in shades of yellow that carries a medium scent of tea and myrrh, perfectly balanced. Its delicate flowers, rich in particularly tender petals, bloom repeatedly throughout the season. At maturity it can reach heights of 3 - 3.5m

A special rose awarded with the RHS Garden of Merit award.
products.vendor: English climbing rose bred by David Austin
